data.name: Furry Came-a-Lot
data.detailed_description:
Hear ye, hear ye! Gather round, brave knights and naughty maidens. In the land of Furry Came-A-Lot, every tale is a rhythm, every quest a climax, and every hero knows how to hit the right notes.

This is no ordinary kingdom — here, your sword is your rhythm, your quest is timing, and your reward is… well, the kind of uncensored furry action bards don’t usually sing about.

Gameplay:

·       Follow the music, tap the buttons at just the right moment-Keep your rhythm true, and your climax bar shall rise

·       Fail too often, and you’ll be cast into the dungeon of blue balls

·       Conquer the song, and behold your reward: a new explicit furry video scene

 

Features:

·       Rhythm-tap gameplay inspired by classic rhythm games (but much dirtier)

·       A lewd medieval parody world (Camelot, but with more cumming)

·       Dozens of uncensored furry videos to unlock, one per completed stage

·       No endless lore, no side quests — just bang out the beat and collect your prize

So don your helmet, raise your lance, and prepare thy loins. For in this kingdom, legends are written not with swords… but with stamina.

data.short_description: Once upon a time, a horny knight tapped to the beat and came a lot. Conquer rhythm challenges to unlock uncensored furry video rewards in this lewd fairytale parody.
data.supported_languages:
英文*, 法文, 日文, 韓文, 俄文, 簡體中文
*具備完整音效支援的語言

pc_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統 *: Windows 7 SP1+ or later
  • 處理器: Dual-core 2.0 GHz
  • 記憶體: 1024 MB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: Integrated or discrete GPU
  • DirectX: 版本：10
  • 儲存空間: 500 MB 可用空間
  • 音效卡: Any
